prompt: Create a file at C:\Users\Administrator\.autoresearch\task-test\hello.txt with the exact content 'hello world from AHE agent'
name: file-creation
description: Agent creates a file with specified content

prompt: Use the GitHub MCP to search for repositories matching 'quantum computing' and tell me the name and stars of the top result
name: github-search
description: Agent uses GitHub MCP to search repos

prompt: Use the brave-search MCP to search for 'capital of France' and tell me the answer
name: brave-search
description: Agent uses brave-search for web search

prompt: Use the context7 MCP to find documentation for React useState hook and summarize how to use it
name: context7-docs

prompt: Write a Python script that prints Fibonacci numbers from 0 to 50, save it to C:\Users\Administrator\.autoresearch\task-test\fib.py, and run it
name: code-generation
description: Agent writes and executes Python code

prompt: Read the file C:\Users\Administrator\.qwen\settings.json and tell me how many MCP servers are configured
name: settings-analysis
description: Agent reads and analyzes config file

prompt: Make a directory called C:\Users\Administrator\.autoresearch\task-test\nested and create two text files inside it: one named 'a.txt' containing 'file A' and one named 'b.txt' containing 'file B'
name: multi-file
description: Agent creates nested structure with multiple files

prompt: Use the chrome-devtools MCP to navigate to https://example.com and tell me the page title
name: browser-navigate
description: Agent uses browser MCP to navigate and extract info

prompt: Create a JSON file at C:\Users\Administrator\.autoresearch\task-test\config.json with content: {"name":"test","enabled":true,"count":5}
name: json-creation
description: Agent creates valid JSON with specific structure

prompt: Write a PowerShell one-liner that lists all .json files in C:\Users\Administrator\.autoresearch\benchmarks (just give me the command, don't run it)
name: script-generation
